title: Black Flash Totem of Undying
description:
This adds a totem of undying with satisfying black and red sparks as well as adding the iconic black flash crackle to the totem of undying sound effect (There is no voice-line BTW)

(I did not create the art used in the icon)
body: A totem of undying texture pack that makes the totem of undying particle effects black and red as well as changing the sound while not overriding the vanilla totem of undying sound (It does not include any voice lines)
